svg.text: PROPOSED CUSTOM DISPLAY FACE • VECTOR CONCEPT 01
OLD-SCHOOL MMO ROMAN STRUCTURE • OCCULT WEDGE SERIFS • CONTROLLED CORRUPTION CUTS
GLYPH SET • UPPERCASE DISPLAY • NUMERALS • CORE PUNCTUATION
Use for: title logo, zone names, boss cards, codex headers, rarity labels, major menu headings.
Do not use for: chat, quest paragraphs, item descriptions, tooltips, combat logs, legal text.
The colored slash is a design marker. In production it becomes a monochrome knockout cut or alternate glyph.
